title: Rumpnissar
body:
~THIS MOD NEEDS GECKOLIB~

Hangout with Rumpnissar
Like these Rumpnissar
![Rumpnissar hanging out with Rumpnissar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a24f1b6c3aae22b3d47b0843077abb3949f9801_0.webp)
Exchange gifts with Rumpnissar (with sweet berries and milk for flowers)
![Rumpnissar trading for Rumpa blomma](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c862952c37c7e273edcb6a5b3f19ccba26d4e25_0.webp)
Look at some great paintings in the museum with Rumpnissar
![Rumpnissar in a Rumpnissar gallery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5359619187dd722011fc1fdc39cfbb62b3332b29_0.webp)
Have a baby with your Rumpnissar wife
![Rumpnisasr family in hospital](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0444b779f2b31071f0074e038a4bebe9726f4280_0.webp)
Play catch with your Rumpnissar son
![Rumpnissar playing catch with his Rumpnissar son](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a08f8f63da3b883b14988fd9f01ee20dcf9e0b5d_0.webp)
And Become the Rumpnissar king with a Rumpa blomma crown
![Rumpnissar king on his throne](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee186ad36b5381d2384af6e8cb0e3445d53389a5_0.webp)
Rumpnissar can be found in Old Growth biomes
[Curseforge download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rumpnissar)
[My Discord server](https://discord.gg/qGjsDBdNzn)
